Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Kelsa]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Unsouled ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 2''' — Kelsa is Lindon's sister.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 5''' — Kelsa is a Copper Ruler who wears orange shadesilk training clothes and a copper badge marked with a scepter.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 5''' — Kelsa is a sacred artist on the Path of the White Fox who cultivates aspects of dreams and light.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 5''' — Kelsa reached the barrier between Copper and Iron at the age of sixteen.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 5''' — Kelsa is on the verge of condensing Iron.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 6''' — Kelsa is a Copper stage practitioner.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 7''' — Kelsa advanced to the Iron stage.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 9''' — Kelsa tells Lindon not to push himself too hard and threatens to pay back those who shame him in the Iron trials.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 10''' — Kelsa is kneeling and crying in Lindon's dream.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 11''' — Kelsa is a person seen in Lindon's visions who eventually receives a jade badge from Patriarch Sairus.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 11''' — Kelsa sat next to Lindon in the stands.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 12''' — Kelsa watched the arena match with horror.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 12''' — Kelsa is the highest-ranking young Iron in the Wei clan.}}

== Underlord ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 22''' — Kelsa is a Wei Shi.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 22''' — Kelsa is being hunted by a sacred beast.}}

== Uncrowned ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 1''' — Kelsa possesses White Fox madra.}}

== Wintersteel ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 28''' — Kelsa has recently earned her eyes and possesses newborn spiritual sense.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 28''' — Kelsa has Skyhunter Iron body.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 28''' — Kelsa's mother is a prisoner in Heaven's Glory.}}

== Bloodline ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 7''' — Kelsa uses the Fox Dream Ruler technique.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 7''' — Kelsa is exhausted during the battle.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 7''' — Kelsa knows that broken panes of Forged madra burn like live coals.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 8''' — Kelsa has been trained by Orthos.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 9''' — Kelsa is unique among her kin in Sacred Valley.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 15''' — Kelsa is pacing next to the turtle.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 15''' — Kelsa is wearing a huge backpack.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 17''' — Kelsa is a character who witnessed the arrival of a second creature in the sky.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 18''' — Kelsa is exhausted and covered in ash and dust.}}

== Reaper ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 6''' — Wei Shi Kelsa is a tall and broad individual.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 6''' — Kelsa is a founding member of the Twin Star sect.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 7''' — Kelsa is undergoing training.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 7''' — Little Blue has grown addicted to training Kelsa.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 7''' — Kelsa advanced to Lowgold.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 19''' — Kelsa uses Foxfire in both hands.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 24''' — Kelsa has a Foxfire tail.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 24''' — Kelsa expressed gratitude.}}

== Dreadgod ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 4''' — Lindon is creating a construct for Kelsa.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 5''' — Kelsa trains the Path of the White Fox.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 5''' — Kelsa is usually bold and direct in her speech.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 15''' — Wei Shi Kelsa is the youngest and strongest Lowgold of the Wei clan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 15''' — Kelsa is a teacher who has only ever trained Lindon as a student.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 17''' — Kelsa uses Foxfire to attack Jai Long.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 17''' — Kelsa used the Foxtail Enforcer technique.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 17''' — Kelsa uses a Striker technique.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 18''' — Kelsa and Jai Chen huddled in fear.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 21''' — Kelsa is answering questions for a family with a hollow expression.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 21''' — Kelsa is wearing a stony mask.}}

== Waybound ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 6''' — Wei Shi Kelsa is the sister of the Void Sage.}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 8''' — Kelsa is Lindon's older sister.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 8''' — Kelsa is a Truegold.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 8''' — Kelsa follows the Path of the White Fox.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 8''' — Kelsa is a Truegold.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 8''' — Kelsa wears a plain gray sacred artist’s robe.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 8''' — Kelsa has a void key.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 8''' — Kelsa uses an invisible sword as a weapon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 8''' — Kelsa uses a combination of White Fox madra and wind to keep her sword unseen.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 8''' — Kelsa uses the Foxtail Enforcer technique from the Path of the White Fox.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 8''' — Kelsa's combat style focuses on confusion, distraction, and erosion.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 8''' — Kelsa possesses a buckler shield that expands from a bracer on her forearm.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 8''' — Kelsa uses Fox Dream to create illusions.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 8''' — Kelsa possesses a Skyhunter Iron body.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 8''' — Kelsa uses a Thousand-Mile Cloud to fly.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 13''' — Kelsa is a stable Truegold.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 13''' — Kelsa is Lindon's sister.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
